path.description: Directory for browser profile dirs (e.g. .posh/browser); created on startup

command.description: Browser binary path; defaults to Chrome on macOS, google-chrome on Linux

profiles.description: Named environments, each with an optional proxy and default URL

app.description: App indicates whether the application mode is enabled for the profile.

url.description: Default URL to open when no URL argument is given

proxy.description: Named SSH proxy from the global proxies config
